content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.thearcticinstitute.org/global-carbon-budget-permafrost-feedback-loops-arctic/", "source_title": "The Global Carbon Budget and Permafrost Feedback ...", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "In order to be considered permafrost, the ground must remain at or below freezing for at least two consecutive years.2) It traditionally act...", "direct_quote": "In order to be considered permafrost, the ground must remain at or below freezing for at least two consecutive years.2) It traditionally acts as a \u201ccarbon sink,\u201d where carbon has been captured and stored.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Essentially, we could make every necessary sacrifice and still see global temperatures rise above 1.5 degrees Celsius if the Arctic becomes ...", "direct_quote": "Essentially, we could make every necessary sacrifice and still see global temperatures rise above 1.5 degrees Celsius if the Arctic becomes a major carbon source instead of remaining a carbon sink.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Fortunately, the recent events in Siberia are bringing a new level of awareness to the leading role that permafrost will play in our future ...", "direct_quote": "Fortunately, the recent events in Siberia are bringing a new level of awareness to the leading role that permafrost will play in our future success or failure in staying below 1.5 degrees of warming.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
